subject: WM-0126 review: changes_requested
body: High: WM-0126 cannot be verified/integrated as written because required bench evidence records repeated 20% blocking failures while the matrix says those failures block WM-0126 integration. Either revise the artifact/task semantics to make WM-0126 explicitly integrable only as stop-sign evidence that blocks M8 closeout, or complete a performance repair/explanation before verification. Evidence consolidation and platform verdict preservation otherwise checked.
